files.patch:
@@ -420,0 +420,5 @@
+
+  UTIL_ARG_WITH(NAME: print-assembly-options, TYPE: string,
+      DEFAULT: [], RESULT: DEFAULT_PRINT_ASSEMBLY_OPTIONS,
+      DESC: [default value for the PrintAssemblyOptions diagnostic flag, passed verbatim to the disassembler])
+  AC_SUBST(DEFAULT_PRINT_ASSEMBLY_OPTIONS)

@@ -150,0 +150,5 @@
+// Default value for PrintAssemblyOptions, set via --with-print-assembly-options.
+#ifndef DEFAULT_PRINT_ASSEMBLY_OPTIONS
+#define DEFAULT_PRINT_ASSEMBLY_OPTIONS nullptr
+#endif
+
@@ -614,1 +619,2 @@
-  product(ccstr, PrintAssemblyOptions, nullptr, DIAGNOSTIC,                 \
+  product(ccstr, PrintAssemblyOptions, DEFAULT_PRINT_ASSEMBLY_OPTIONS,      \
+          DIAGNOSTIC,                                                       \

@@ -64,0 +64,5 @@
+A default value for `PrintAssemblyOptions` can be set at configure time with
+`--with-print-assembly-options=<value>` (e.g. `intel` for Intel syntax on x86,
+if supported by the chosen backend). The runtime `-XX:PrintAssemblyOptions=...`
+flag still takes precedence.
+
